summary: Iteration 23: Audit Programs (BACF6-05) Feature Testing. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All components working - page loads, create modal, edit modal with activities table, PDF download (208KB).
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 API endpoints working correctly: GET list, POST create, GET by id, PUT update, DELETE, GET pdf, POST approve
PDF generation using ReportLab produces professional bilingual document (208KB)
Edit modal shows all 6 pre-populated activities with correct fields (activity, audit_type, stage1-2, sur1-2, rc, planned_date)
Arabic RTL support working correctly throughout the page
Status badge correctly shows approved/draft states
Create modal correctly shows contract review dropdown (shows message when no completed reviews available)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - existing audit program 3450b020-fd96-446a-af59-541af71eb233 used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit Programs (BACF6-05) feature is fully functional. Endpoints at /api/audit-programs with CRUD + PDF + approve. Frontend page at /audit-programs shows stats cards, table with programs, create/edit modals. Edit modal has full activities table with 6 default activities. PDF generator at /app/backend/audit_program_generator.py using ReportLab.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/audit-programs: Create from contract review - WORKING (prevents duplicates)

frontend_components.audit_programs_page: Loads at /audit-programs with RTL Arabic support
frontend_components.stats_cards: 4 cards showing total, draft, approved, completed counts
frontend_components.programs_table: Shows organization, standards, activities count, status, actions
frontend_components.edit_modal: Shows full activities table with 6 default activities
frontend_components.pdf_download: Download button triggers PDF generation and download

mocked_apis.note: No external integrations - all features are self-contained
